task_snapshots.title: 332d — Zero-config tests and CLI overrides (--cli, --model)
task_snapshots.description:
[subtask of 039847068f48]

Add integration tests for zero-config flow and implement optional CLI override flags.

## Goal
1. Write tests/unit/test_zero_config.py covering:
   - Auto-detect on fresh .sdd/ (mocked agent discovery)
   - bernstein.yaml created with detected agents
   - Auto-selection of primary agent
   - Override flags (--cli, --model) take precedence over detected config
   - Skip init when .sdd/ already exists

2. Add CLI flags to src/bernstein/cli/main.py:
   - --cli AGENT: force specific agent (claude, codex, gemini, aider)
   - --model MODEL: force specific model (opus, sonnet, o4-mini, etc.)
   - Both flags override auto-detected config

## Files to modify
- tests/unit/test_zero_config.py (create new)
- src/bernstein/cli/main.py (add --cli, --model Click options)

## Completion signal
- All zero-config tests pass
- --cli flag forces specific agent
- --model flag forces specific model
- Override logic correctly prioritizes explicit flags > config file > auto-detected
- bernstein -g "task" --cli claude works as expected
